title: Wahlenbergia obovata
taxonomy: Wahlenbergia obovata is a species within the family Campanulaceae. This family is commonly known as the bellflower family. It is a group of flowering plants that are widely distributed across the globe, with many species found in temperate regions. The Campanulaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, including Campanuloideae, which contains the Wahlenbergia genus. Wahlenbergia obovata specifically belongs to the subfamily Campanuloideae.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties.
